title: Identity, Permissions, Ownership, umask, and ACLs
description: Create a shared operations directory that grants required access without world-writable shortcuts or unexplained privilege escalation. Learners cumulatively produce a least-privilege access matrix and permission lab through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Interpret real and effective user, primary and supplementary groups, and process credentials from id and process evidence.
Calculate read, write, and execute effects for owner, group, and other on regular files and directories.
Translate symbolic and octal chmod operations while preserving unrelated bits and verifying the result.
